narrative:
18Madison (precinct in Perry County) has 790 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.5 percentage points.
